name: Skill Seekers (Doc Converter)
description: Universal data layer for AI systems that converts documentation websites, GitHub repositories, PDFs, and local codebases into structured knowledge assets for Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, RAG pipelines (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Haystack), vector databases (Chroma, FAISS, Qdrant, Pinecone, Weaviate), and AI coding assistants (Cursor, Windsurf, Cline). Features MCP server integration, conflict detection between docs and code, multi-source merging, and export to 16 platform-specific formats.

findings_summary: PASS: MIT License present and valid
PASS: Active development with commits as recent as 2026-02-25
PASS: Comprehensive test suite with 1,880+ passing tests
PASS: CI/CD pipelines present (tests, lint, release, docker workflows)
PASS: CONTRIBUTING.md with structured branching workflow
PASS: CHANGELOG.md maintained with detailed entries
PASS: Published to PyPI as 'skill-seekers' package
PASS: MCP server with typed tool definitions, no eval/exec found
PASS: .env.example uses placeholder values, no real credentials
PASS: Release workflow publishes via PyPI token secret, not hardcoded
PASS: Bilingual documentation (English and Simplified Chinese)
WARN: No SECURITY.md or vulnerability disclosure policy
WARN: LICENSE contains placeholder '[Your Name/Username]' not replaced
INFO: Individual developer repo (not an org), but highly active
INFO: 98 open issues suggests active user community
INFO: Requires API keys (Anthropic, optional Google/OpenAI) at runtime — user-supplied only

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 421 files analyzed. Found: 26 network, 150 file, 120 env, 83 system calls. Primary: python.

agent_c_star.comment: 1814 findings: 1 critical, 352 high, 312 medium, 1149 low. Obfuscation detected!. Injection patterns found!.

agent_d.comment: Score 10. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 95%. Deterministic override: injection patterns detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 10/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 1814 scanner findings. Rejected at 95% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.
